name: Northwest Sugar-Cured Salmon
recipeIngredient: 1.5 pounds salmon or bluefish fillet, or butterflied trout (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fish over a slow fire; if in doubt, let the coals burn down first.
You can use any fatty fish in this recipe: We like the results with bluefish and trout, too.
2. Combine brown sugar, vinegar, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Rub the mixture evenly over the fleshy side of the fish. Wrap tightly and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or up to 24 hours.
3. Heat the grill. Grill, covered, skin side down, over medium-low heat for 15 to 18 minutes (8 to 10 minutes for trout), until opaque. Turn the fish over and grill, uncovered, for an additional 2 minutes.
PER SERVING Calories: 270 Total Fat: 11 g Saturated Fat: 2 g Cholesterol: 94 mg Sodium: 627 mg Carbohydrates: 7 g Protein: 34 g
